basicInfo.name: O'Mok
basicInfo.flavor: O'Mok began to naturally manifest her latent talents, such as channeling the power of spirits or awakening sacred beasts. But due to Teo's staunch opposition to allowing such a young child to bear arms, she managed to grow up living an otherwise quiet and ordinary life.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 2 Allies (Excluding Self)
 - Grants Magic Damage Boost. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - 2 Allies (Excluding Self)
 - Adds Effect: 10% Magic Damage Boost. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]

Skill 1.name: Tiger's Chivalry
Skill 1.desc:
Enemy with the Highest Defense
 - 32% HP Alteration
 - Deals damage equal to 305% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - Allies (Magic)
 - Grants Guardian Spirit. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants 2 Debuff Removal(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Magic Allies
 - Adds Effect: 2 Debuff Removal(s).

Skill 2.name: Moon Tiger Fire Carts
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 70% of Magic Attack plus 7% of the target's Max HP 2 time(s). (HP-based damage is limited to 75% of caster's Attack.) (Damage increases by up to 50%, proportional to the target's current HP.)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 80% of Magic Attack plus 9% of the target's Max HP.
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Adds Effect: Ignores 65% of Defense.

Passive.name: Sacred Tree's Protection
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Camouflage. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - All Allies
 - Grants Magic Attack Boost. [Always Active].
 - All Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Weakness Hit Chance Reduction and Defense Reduction upon falling in battle. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - All Allies
 - Increases Effect: Magic Attack Boost to 25%.
 - All Enemies
 - Increases Effect: Defense Reduction to 34%.
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - Self
 - Adds Effect: Guts. [Once per Battle]
 - Adds Effect: Grants a Barrier equal to 155% of the caster's Magic Attack upon triggering Guts. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]

transcendence.transcend_7: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_8: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_9: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_10: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_11: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_12: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.

profile.likes: Everything about the Night Crows, Karon, Okchundang candy, sesame seed crunch, Gamju sweet rice drink, kindness, warmth, animals, kites, running
profile.dislikes: Clan elders, Sujeonggwa cinnamon punch, spicy foods, greasy foods, coldness, darkness, night, the quiet
profile.story: O'Mok began to naturally manifest her latent talents, such as channeling the power of spirits or awakening sacred beasts. But due to Teo's staunch opposition to allowing such a young child to bear arms, she managed to grow up living an otherwise quiet and ordinary life.

basicInfo.name: O'Mok
basicInfo.flavor: At the eleventh hour, O'Mok was rescued by Karl Heron — and in an instant, she broke the curse on his eyepatch that had tormented him for so long. Recognizing her miraculous powers, the Night Crows inducted O'Mok into their ranks.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 90% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 90% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Tiger's Chivalry
Skill 1.desc:
Enemy with the Highest Defense
 - 46% HP Alteration
 - Deals damage equal to 275% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - Allies (Magic)
 - Grants Guardian Spirit. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 275% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Moon Tiger Fire Carts
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 62% of Magic Attack plus 5% of the target's Max HP 2 time(s). (HP-based damage is limited to 75% of caster's Attack.) (Damage increases by up to 50%, proportional to the target's current HP.)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 62% of Physical Attack.

 - All Allies

 - All Enemies

basicInfo.name: O'Mok
basicInfo.flavor: When a horde of monsters emerged from a dimensional rift, the people of O'Mok's village sacrificed their lives to protect her. She felt burdened with tremendous guilt, believing herself responsible for the villagers' deaths.
